assert_QueryParamsValid.condition:
state /= "Idle" implies
    and allowed_tools_param  = "empty_list"
    and system_prompt_param  = "EXTRACT_SYSTEM_PROMPT"
    and max_turns_param      = 1
    and prompt_param        /= "UNSET"
